name: @irisrun/journal-export
description: Iris verifiable portable journal — a self-contained, content-addressed (SHA-256 + tamper-evident hash chain) export of a session's snapshot + journal tail, with two-tier verification (Tier 1 file-only structure + content-address; Tier 2 replay-determinism given the harness reducer) and cross-host import. The host-side home of node:crypto; keeps @irisrun/core and @irisrun/audit Node-free. Deps @irisrun/core + @irisrun/audit only.
